featureDetection.rationale: Checks Uint8Array instances and prototype objects natively to toggle support status indicator panels.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Natively matches all base64/hex parsing rules via custom polyfills if the browser lacks native functions.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Instantly translates input in any of the three boxes in real time, maintaining a lock-free update flow.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Fabulous playground covering all core aspects of TC39 proposal.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows design rules beautifully with high contrast.
